name: Surging Serum (Lesser)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Involuntary jolts and surges of energy move through the drinker's body as it restores normal muscle control. When you drink this elixir, it counteracts at 2nd-rank and has a [[/r 1d20+8 #Counteract]]{+8 Counteract Modifier} to remove the or condition from a single source, using the source of that condition to determine the counteract rank and DC.
